scripts.dev:studio: pnpm exec cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_STUDIO_MODE=true pnpm dev
scripts.dev:client: pnpm exec cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_STUDIO_MODE=false pnpm dev
scripts.dev:desktop:studio: pnpm exec cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_STUDIO_MODE=true pnpm run build:engine && pnpm exec cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_STUDIO_MODE=true pnpm --filter desktop dev
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm build:engine && pnpm --filter dashboard build:desktop && pnpm --filter desktop build
